Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How are you doing on this lovely afternoon?[n]{f 1 5 0}Chagall is open for business today. Our café's most popular item, Pheromone Coffee, is guaranteed to increase your ability to captivate the hearts of everyone around you.[n]{f 1 5 0}We look forward to your visit. {f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We hope everyone is having a great day.[n]{f 1 5 0}Chagall is looking for someone to work at the café today. Students may apply, no experience required. This is a paid position, and perks include free Pheromone Coffee.[n]{f 1 5 0}We look forward to meeting you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chagall is very busy today, and we could use all the help we can get.[n]{f 1 5 0}Students may apply, no experience required. Those who work today will receive a bonus on top of the normal paycheck.[n]{f 1 5 0}We look forward to meeting you.[n]{f 1 1}
